% Computational Complexity Results
\begin{table}[!t]
\centering
\caption{Computational Efficiency Comparison (N=500 users)}
\label{tab:timing_detailed}
\begin{tabular}{lcc}
\toprule
\textbf{Method} & \textbf{Runtime} & \textbf{Speedup} \\
\midrule
Static & 0.30 ms & 2827.6� slower \\
Balanced & 0.19 ms & 4366.2� slower \\
\midrule

\midrule
Bipartite & 32927 ms & 38.9� faster \\
Blossom & 44749 ms & 52.9� faster \\

\end{tabular}
